compressed_prompt: write tour guide cover letter, no caps, <5 sentences
response:
here is a sample tour guide cover letter:

dear hiring manager, 
i am excited to apply for the tour guide position at your esteemed organization. with my passion for history and excellent communication skills, i am confident in my ability to provide engaging and informative tours. i have experience leading groups and creating memorable experiences. i look forward to discussing my application. 
sincerely, [your name]
